rule-based.name: Deterministic Rule-Based Assistant
rule-based.description: 100% offline, keyword-matching assistant accessing local curriculum directly.

ollama.name: Local LLM via Ollama
ollama.description: Offline AI running on your local machine.

tools.name: explainConcept
tools.description: Explains curriculum concept by retrieving lesson.md and cheatsheet.md

tools.name: recommendNextStep
tools.description: Generates the next study recommend based on current progress & weak topics

tools.name: revealHint
tools.description: Retrieves a non-spoiler hint for a coding problem

tools.name: explainCompilerError
tools.description: Interprets syntax, compilation or test execution verdicts errors

tools.name: querySearch
tools.description: Searches curriculum, coding problems and interview questions for matching terms
